channel.title: All Registered Polls for the Walloon Parliament
channel.description: All Registered Polls for the Walloon Parliament

item.title: Opinion Poll by Ipsos for Het Laatste Nieuws, Le Soir, RTL TVi and VTM, 1–9 June 2026 – Seating Plan Projection
item.description:
Seating plan projection for the Walloon Parliament
38 seats needed for a majority
Opinion poll by Ipsos for Het Laatste Nieuws, Le Soir, RTL TVi and VTM, 1–9 June 2026
Details on null/2026-06-09-Ipsos.html
